AdditionalAttributes.description:
Red Bull Energy Drink is a carbonated taurine drink. Serve ice cold. Vitalizes Body and Mind. Appreciated worldwide by top athletes, students, busy professionals and travellers on long journeys.

Red Bull Energy Drink, 473ml (4 Pack)

RED BULL GIVES YOU WINGS
Inspired by functional drinks from the Far East, Dietrich Mateschitz founded Red Bull in the mid-1980s. He developed a new product and a unique marketing concept and launched Red Bull Energy Drink on April 1, 1987 in Austria. A brand new product category - Energy Drinks - was born.
WHEN TO DRINK
Appreciated worldwide by top athletes, students, busy professionals and travellers on long journeys.
WHAT’S INSIDE THE CAN
Caffeine: Caffeine was already known by ancient civilisations. They consumed it from natural sources like tea, coffee, cacao beans and cola nuts and appreciated its stimulating effects on the human body.
Taurine: Taurine is an amino acid, naturally occurring in the human body and present in the daily diet. It is involved in a wide range of biological processes.
B-group vitamins: Vitamins are essential micronutrients that are required for maintaining normal body functions.
Sugars: Red Bull Energy Drink is made with sugar sourced from sugar beets. Alpine Water: Naturally, water is a main ingredient of Red Bull.

RedBull Energy Drink's special formula contains ingredients of high quality: Caffeine, Taurine, B-Group Vitamins, Sugars, Alpine Water.

One 250ml can of RedBull Energy Drink contains 80 mg of caffeine, about the same amount as in a cup of home-brewed coffee.

The amount of sugars in a can of RedBull Energy Drink is comparable to the level of sugars in an equivalent amount of apple or orange juice – 11 g per 100 ml.

Red Bull cans are made of 100% recyclable aluminium.

Vitalizes Body and Mind.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Share a moment of bliss with LINDOR, the finest Lindt chocolate with a delicate chocolate shell and irresistibly smooth melting filling, created by the Lindt Master Chocolatier. The perfect gift for any occasion or to share with family and friends.LINDOR Assorted Cornet includes a mix of milk, white, 70% cocoa and hazelnut truffles.

Wherever and whenever you take a LINDOR moment, it just seems to make life feel so much more sublime. When you unwrap LINDOR and break its delicate chocolate shell, the irresistibly smooth filling starts to melt gently carrying you away in a moment of bliss. LINDOR, created by the Lindt Master Chocolatiers.

At Lindt, we take pride in the chocolate we have so passionately created since 1845. We aim to make the finest chocolate that is matched by equally high ethical and sustainability standards, taking care at every step from bean to bar. That way, you are able to wholeheartedly indulge your senses, every single time.

Our sustainability program, the Lindt and Sprüngli Farming Program enables us to trace our cocoa beans right back to the farmers. This allows us to support farmers, their families and communities on the ground according to their specific local needs. 100% of our cocoa beans are traceable back to their origin and externally verified.

A fine chocolate shell with smooth melting chocolate filling

Melt away into a moment of bliss with our irresistibly smooth LINDOR assorted milk, white, 70% cocoa & hazelnut chocolate truffles

With decades of expertise, the Lindt Master Chocolatiers capture perfection in Swiss chocolate.

The ideal gift for every occasion, from Valentine's Day to Easter, birthdays and Christmas, or for sharing with family & friends.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Cadbury Dairy Milk Chocolate Block, perfect for a sweet treat. With its deliciously smooth and creamy taste, it's a classic choice. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Deliciously smooth and creamy Cadbury Dairy Milk milk chocolate.

The equivalent of a glass and a half of full cream milk in every 200g of Cadbury Dairy Milk Milk Chocolate. Proudly made in Tasmania. 

Sustainably sourced cocoa. We partner with cocoa farmers to help them gain knowledge and skills to improve their livelihoods, strengthen their communities and inspire the next generation of cocoa farmers.

A Cheer & A Half
Let's celebrate the inspiring moments of generosity within our community, on and off the field with a cheer and a half. 

A Cheer & A Half 
For Leadership
Football royalty, Adam Goodes is the true embodiment of a leader. This was on full display during his team's glorious 2012 premiership win. Playing through a torn knee ligament, Adam fought through the pain and stood up when it counted for his team, kicking a much needed goal in the dying minutes of the match. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Being a Legend
Australian cricket legend Mark Taylor ended the 2nd day of a 5-Day test against Pakistan with 334 runs not out, tying with Don Bradman's Australian record. Leading Pakistan before the third day, Mark decided to declare alongside Don's record, instead of surpassing him, showing respect to the all-time great of the game. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Being a Mate
Running alongside a fellow Aussie in the last event of the 2020 Olympic Decathlon, Cedric Dubler realised his teammate was off pace in the closing stages of the 1500M. He needed to stay in touch with the runners ahead to secure enough points for a bronze medal. Cedric, knowing that he himself couldn't place, instead decided to cheer on his mate to a bronze medal finish. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Purpose
As the first Australian rugby team left for the UK in 1908, the British press nicknamed them 'The Rabbits'. The men gave themselves a different name, 'The Wallabies' - for their purpose would be to never take a backward step. They defeated England 9-3 and The Wallabies legacy was forged and preserved by all who wear the iconic gold jersey. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Respect
Daisy Pearce is one of the most respected pioneers of women's football. Along with being an exceptional captain and expert commentator, Daisy is a mum to twins and the first active player to return to top level women's football post pregnancy, paving the way for other women to do the same. 

A Cheer & A Half
For A Sportsman
Simon Clarke is one of Australia's greatest cyclists and sportsmen. In 2015, Clarke was behind a fellow Aussie competing in the final stretch of a road race when he noticed their tyre was punctured. Even though they were on different teams, Clarke rushed to his countryman's aid, giving him his own spare wheel to help him finish the race. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Team Spirit
During the 2020 Olympics, the Matildas decided to make one small change when walking on the field in the ultimate act of team spirit. Competing teams would normally pose with their nation's flag. The Matildas instead decided to display the Aboriginal flag as a sign of unity across the country. 

A Cheer & A Half
For Courage
Sam Bloom is one of Australia's most accomplished surfers. After falling from a balcony, Sam tragically shattered her spine, leaving her paralysed from the chest down. A testament to how far courage can take you, Sam rehabilitated herself and went on to become a 2x world and Australian Para Surfing champion, inspiring all Australians to never give up. 

Join us in cheering on your heroes both on & off the field by heading to our website today https://www.cadburycheerandahalf.com.au/

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Add Some Sparkle To Your Day With Schweppes Classic Mixers Soda Water - Perfect For Any Occasion!

Looking for a refreshing drink that can also be used as a versatile mixer? Look no further than Schweppes Classic Mixers Soda Water 1.1L! This premium soda water is made with mineral salts and pristine triple filtered water, creating a crisp and delightful taste that's perfect for any occasion.

But what really sets Schweppes Classic Mixers Soda Water apart is its signature Schweppervescence - the delicate bubbles that give this drink its incredible fizz and texture. Whether you enjoy it on its own or as a mixer for your favourite alcohol, Schweppes Classic Mixers Soda Water is sure to add some sparkle to your day.

So why not try it chilled, with fresh lemon, lime or orange slices for a refreshing and invigorating drink? Or get creative and mix it with your favourite spirits to create delicious and unique cocktails. With Schweppes Classic Mixers Soda Water, the possibilities are endless!

Premium soda water made with mineral salts and triple filtered water

Signature Schweppervescence for incredible fizz and texture

Refreshing and invigorating when served chilled with fresh fruit

Versatile mixer for creating unique and delicious cocktails

Endless possibilities for adding sparkle to any occasion

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Arnott’s Biscuits Family Favourites are a pack of assorted sweet biscuits featuring seven of your favourites: Nice plain biscuits, Milk Arrowroot, Choc Ripple, Scotch Finger, Teddy Bear, Butternut Snap and Milk Coffee.

Bring the family together with this delicious assortment of seven of your all-time favourite Arnott’s sweet biscuits. This collection includes the buttery goodness of Nice plain biscuits, the iconic taste of Milk Arrowroot plain biscuits, the rich and chocolatey Choc Ripple, the crumbly and comforting Scotch Finger, the fun and delightful Teddy Bear, the sweet and crunchy Butternut Snap, and the smooth and mild Milk Coffee. This collection of crunchy, plain biscuits is perfect for sharing and contains no artificial flavours. There’s something for everyone in this pack. Perfect for filling the biscuit tin and enjoying the simple everyday pleasure of dunking them in your morning cuppa or sharing with friends and family.

• Seven of Australia’s favourite Arnott's biscuits for sharing and dunking

• A perfect mix of classic plain and sweet biscuits that have been loved for generations

• Ideal for sharing with family and friends, these cookies & biscuits are a staple in any household

• Each biscuit variety is individually Aussie made and Aussie loved, making it easy to offer a selection that everyone will enjoy

• Biscuits made without artificial colours and flavours

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Tired of bland and boring snacks? Change the way you munch with Takis Rolled Corn Tortilla Chips and give your taste buds the treat of deliciously intense flavour. We know the urge for a flavour-packed snack can strike at any time, so we’ve paved the way with these uniquely shaped chips that unleash tantalizing waves of flavour and fire up your tastebuds with every bite.

Pack a bag to give yourself a tasty pick-me-up at school, be ready to munch away while spending the day hanging with your friends, or grab a handful for when you need a boost of flavour while hunting for new adventures. Not only are Takis rolled corn tortilla chips the ultimate snack, but they are also a great food for sharing with friends and family. Share a snack with your squad and transform a low-key hangout into a delicious celebration, or turn the vibes up to ten on your next road trip.

  • Dare to dive into the flavourful world of Takis snacks with a bag of rolled corn tortilla chips; With their crunchy texture, signature rolled shape, and intense flavour, these uniquely shaped chips will blast up your tastebuds with every bite
  • Blue Heat: Spicy hot chili pepper flavoured chips in an electrifying blue colour that battles for our hottest snack; Heat-O-Meter: Extreme
  • Ideal for serving in large bowls, this sharing size bag is loaded with enough intensity to satisfy everyone around you; pop open a bag at parties, tailgates, BBQ, or outdoor get-togethers, then put it back in the pantry to save for your next craving
  • Looking for the ultimate back-to-school snack that kids will rave about; look no further than our individually wrapped Takis snacks; bursting with explosive flavour, these snacks offer a wide variety of popular and delicious options
  • From the original rolled tortilla chip to a variety of high-quality, extraordinary spicy snack options, we create delicious snacking experiences for the fearless; discover our family of supercharged Takis snacks and dare to savor the intense flavours.
